node.text: John shared that he had a doll in his childhood that made him feel better, reminding him to look out for others when they're feeling down.

node.text: John expressed concern about the lack of proper resources for kids in education and the need to make things better.

node.text: John is focused on funding schools and improving infrastructure due to past experiences of lack of education and infrastructure in his neighborhood.
